pages.title: AI Interlude
pages.tagline: Step into the silence between signals.

pages.body: Close your eyes and drift through this digital void where sound becomes a place to visit rather than just hear. 'AI Interlude' is not merely music; it is an invitation to wander alone within a vast, glowing architecture of thought. Here, every synth swell feels like a memory retrieved from the cloud, while subtle brass whispers offer comfort in the quietest corners of your mind. This track does not demand attention but rewards stillness with layers of atmospheric depth that expand around you like fog on city glass. It is a journey into futuristic isolation where connection happens through shared silence and minimalist textures. Let the driving beat carry you forward without rushing, allowing space for introspection to bloom naturally in the gaps between notes.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (129 BPM) F# major track built on a driving yet spacious electronic beat with layered synth pads and subtle brass/strings swells that create an immersive, futuristic atmosphere.

members.name: BRASS
members.bio: Adds hopeful glimmers to quiet moments.
